headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock with Solid Fundamentals and 2 We Turn Down
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.

raw.headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock with Solid Fundamentals and 2 We Turn Down
raw.summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.

headline: Baxter Q1 Preview: Will Operational Headwinds Weigh on Results Again?
summary: BAX heads into Q1 earnings with revenues and profit set to fall sharply as operational pressures, weak demand and product disruptions weigh on results.

raw.headline: Baxter Q1 Preview: Will Operational Headwinds Weigh on Results Again?
